pi_items.source: Calculated based on '5 MB' threshold from task description. Verified Apache Tomcat 9.0.85 tarball file size is > 5242880 bytes (11,809,177 bytes).
Task description requests identifying artifacts exceeding 5 MB.
Verified in export_result.sh checking for file at this path to evaluate the agent.
Verified in setup_task.sh which deploys downloaded artifacts to localhost:8082/artifactory/example-repo-local.

privileged_info_summary: The task targets identifying artifacts larger than 5 MB (5,242,880 bytes) in the 'example-repo-local' repository. The results must be output to /home/ga/large_artifacts.txt. The true large artifact is apache-tomcat-9.0.85.tar.gz (~11.8 MB), while commons-lang3-3.14.0.jar is below the threshold (~643 KB).
